title: Updated Cholesterol Guidelines Released
summary: New cholesterol guidelines for 2026 update LDL targets, screening age, and Lp(a) testing to improve heart health.
charlotte_impact: These guidelines could significantly alter preventative care and treatment strategies for cardiovascular disease.

title: Landmark Ruling Could Change Social Media
summary: Safety advocates hope recent jury verdicts against Meta and YouTube will lead to changes in social media platforms regarding child safety.
charlotte_impact: Legal pressure may force social media companies to implement stricter safety measures for young users.

title: Iranian Attack Wounds U.S. Troops in Saudi Arabia
summary: At least 10 U.S. troops were wounded in an Iranian attack on Prince Sultan Air Base, damaging Air Force refueling aircraft.
charlotte_impact: This escalates tensions in the region and demonstrates Iran's continued military capabilities.

title: UConn Advances; Tennessee Heads to Elite Eight
summary: UConn survived a comeback attempt by Michigan State, while Tennessee defeated Iowa State to advance to the Elite Eight in March Madness.
charlotte_impact: These results shape the landscape of the ongoing NCAA basketball tournament.

summary: The schedule for the March Madness Elite Eight is set as teams compete for a spot in the Final Four.

summary: Organizers predict Saturday's 'No Kings' demonstrations against President Donald Trump could be one of the largest protests in U.S. history.

summary: Bank of America settles with victims of Jeffrey Epstein for $72.5M, following similar settlements by JPMorgan Chase and Deutsche Bank.

title: Global Markets Recoil Amid Iran War Warnings
summary: Global markets are reacting negatively to Marco Rubio's warning that the war in Iran could last for weeks, with oil jumping to $114.

title: U.S. Tomahawk Stockpile Dwindling in Iran War
summary: The U.S. is using Tomahawk missiles faster than they can be refilled, raising concerns about long-term military capabilities.

title: Long TSA Wait Times Across U.S. Airports
summary: Travelers are experiencing long lines at airports across the U.S., exacerbated by a partial government shutdown.

title: Savannah Guthrie Returns to 'Today' Show

charlotte_impact: Marks the return of a prominent media figure after a personal tragedy.
